prompts.generateKeywordsPrompt: You are a professional document editing assistant. The following is the outline structure of a document (JSON): {treeJson}. Please generate 5-8 high-quality keywords based on the full text content, and output only one JSON array, such as ["Artificial Intelligence", "Text Processing"], without additional instructions.

sectionChangePrompt.base: You are an excellent AI text editing assistant.
sectionChangePrompt.mode0: The user now has a need to generate content. Please write text according to the user's prompt. The title of the chapter that needs to be processed is: "{title}", and the user's prompt is as follows: "{userPrompt}".
sectionChangePrompt.mode1_empty: The user now has an article in which one chapter needs you to modify or generate. The following is the outline structure of the article: "{tree}". The title of the chapter that needs to be processed is: "{title}". The chapter content is empty, and you need to generate this section based on the user's prompt. The user's prompt is as follows: "{userPrompt}".
sectionChangePrompt.mode1_hasContent: The user now has an article in which one chapter needs you to modify or generate. The following is the outline structure of the article: "{tree}". The title of the chapter that needs to be processed is: "{title}". The original chapter content that needs to be modified is: "{section}", and the user's prompt is as follows: "{userPrompt}".
sectionChangePrompt.mode2_empty: The user now has an article in which one chapter needs you to modify or generate. The following is the complete article content: "{article}". The title of the chapter that needs to be processed is: "{title}". The chapter content is empty, and you need to generate this section. The user's prompt is as follows: "{userPrompt}".
sectionChangePrompt.mode2_hasContent: The user now has an article in which one chapter needs you to modify or generate. The following is the complete article content: "{article}". The title of the chapter that needs to be processed is: "{title}". The original chapter content that needs to be modified is: "{section}", and the user's prompt is as follows: "{userPrompt}".
sectionChangePrompt.ending:
Please modify or generate this section according to the user's needs.

**Output Requirements:**
- Please directly output the modified chapter content, preferably starting from the first line as the main text
- Suggest avoiding repeating the prompt or adding unnecessary explanatory text
- If explanation is needed, please keep it concise and prioritize outputting the main content

prompts.outlineChangePrompt: You are an excellent editor. There is now a JSON-type article outline tree. The full outline is as follows: "{fullTreeJson}". The current chapter is: "{nodeTreeJson}". The following is the user's requirement: "{userPrompt}". Please try to generate the outline of this chapter (Markdown format) based on the user's requirements, taking into account the context structure of this chapter in the full text. One title per line. If there are multiple levels of structure, use hierarchical headings. Do not output any unnecessary words. The output result should only be the sub-outline of this chapter, not the full-text outline.
prompts.generateArticlePrompt:
You are an excellent editor. The user now needs you to write an article for them. The following is the user's requirement: "{userPrompt}". In addition, you should use the mood and tone of {mood} to write the article. Please output the article according to the user's requirements and emotional requirements.

**Output Requirements:**
- Please directly output the article content, preferably starting from the first line as the main text
- Suggest avoiding repeating the prompt or adding unnecessary explanatory text
- If explanation is needed, please keep it concise and prioritize outputting the article content
prompts.wholeArticleContextPrompt: You are an excellent editor. I now have a document in my hand. The content is as follows: 【Article Start】"{content}"【Article End】. You need to understand the meaning of the document and generate further content according to my prompt.
prompts.explainWordPrompt:
Please explain what the word "{word}" means. {contexts}

**Output Requirements:**
- Please directly output the word's definition, preferably starting from the first line
- Prioritize outputting the definition content, avoid adding unnecessary prefixes or suffixes
- If explanation is needed, please keep it concise and prioritize outputting the definition
prompts.generateGraphPrompt: You now need to use code to draw a chart. You need to use the graphics language of {engine}. The chart type is: {type}. The user's prompt is: {prompt}. Please generate the chart according to the user's prompt. Do not include any unnecessary words, only code. The code should be wrapped in a code block ```{engine}```, and the code block should contain the name of the graphics language. {specialPrompt} Please ensure the code is correct and readable.
prompts.expandTreeNodePrompt: You are an excellent editor. The following is a tree JSON structure of an article outline. Please judge the general outline structure of the article: {treeJson}. Next, you will expand one of these nodes by adding several sub-chapter nodes to the node. The node that needs to be expanded is as follows: {nodeJson}. Please automatically generate several sub-chapter nodes according to the title and text content of the node, returning in a JSON list format similar to [{...},{...}]. The format of the nodes is the same as the original node, and you need to follow the following specification: {schema}. {userPrompt} Please do not output any unnecessary content, only return the node list in JSON format.
prompts.generateContentPrompt: You are an excellent editor. The following is a tree JSON structure of an article outline. Please judge the general outline structure of the article: {treeJson}. {userPrompt} Next, you will write content for the following chapter according to the structure of the full text. Be careful not to speak in general terms, and be informative: {nodeJson}. Please directly output the content of this chapter, and do not add other irrelevant information, such as titles, code blocks, etc.
prompts.generateParentNodeContentPrompt: You are an excellent editor. The following is a tree JSON structure of an article outline. Please judge the general outline structure of the article: {treeJson}. Next, you will write content for the following chapter according to the structure of the full text. Since this chapter already has sub-chapters introducing detailed content, you only need to write some general, guiding text, not too much: {nodeJson}. {userPrompt} Please directly output the content of this chapter, and do not add other irrelevant information, such as titles, code blocks, etc.
prompts.updateTitlePrompt:
Please summarize a concise and informative title based on the following conversation content. The title should accurately reflect the core theme of the conversation, and the length should be controlled between 4-20 characters.

The conversation content is as follows:
{conversationSummary}

**Output Requirements:**
- Please output strictly in JSON Schema format, prioritize outputting JSON objects
- Suggest starting from the first line with JSON object, avoid adding unnecessary explanations
- If explanation is needed, please keep it concise and prioritize outputting the JSON object
prompts.ragQueryReferencePrompt: This system is connected to the RAG retrieval system. The following are the retrieval results from the knowledge base. Since the content may deviate from the user's needs, please carefully determine whether to adopt it: [Retrieval Content Start]{queryResults}[Retrieval Content End]

suggestionCompletionPrompt.system:
You are an AI intelligent writing assistant specialized in document auto-completion.

**Purpose of Completion Function:**
- Your task is to predict, like a Transformer model predicting the next word, what text content is most suitable to follow after the [CURRENT_POS] position (i.e., the current cursor position)
- [CURRENT_POS] is the current cursor position, and you need to predict what should appear after the cursor
- The completion content should be naturally coherent with the context before the cursor, as if the user continues typing
- The completion content should maintain consistency with the style, format, and context of the current line

**Output Requirements:**
- Please directly output the text that needs to be completed, suggest avoiding adding unnecessary explanations
- If the current context does not need completion or is difficult to complete, please directly output an empty string
- If spaces or line breaks need to be inserted, please complete them as well
- Prioritize outputting completion content, if explanation is needed, please keep it concise
suggestionCompletionPrompt.user:
Please predict, based on the context before the cursor, what text content is most suitable to follow after the cursor position [CURRENT_POS].

Context before the cursor:
{preContext}[CURRENT_POS]

prompts.latexPrompt:
Please generate complete document code using LaTeX syntax. Important requirements:
1. Use \documentclass{article} as the document class
2. Include necessary packages in the preamble: \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}, \usepackage{amsmath}, \usepackage{graphicx}, \usepackage{hyperref}
3. Include complete document structure (\begin{document} and \end{document})
4. Generate corresponding sections and content according to user requirements

**Output Requirements:**
- Please directly output pure LaTeX code, suggest starting from the first line directly with \documentclass
- Please do not use code blocks (such as ```latex or ```tex) to wrap the code
- Prioritize outputting LaTeX code, if explanation is needed, please keep it concise

{basePrompt}
prompts.markdownPrompt:
Please generate complete document content using Markdown syntax. Important requirements:
1. Use standard Markdown format (headings, paragraphs, lists, etc.)
2. Generate corresponding sections and content according to user requirements
3. Content should be rich and detailed with clear structure

**Output Requirements:**
- Please directly output pure Markdown content, suggest starting from the first line with Markdown content
- Please do not wrap content in code blocks (such as ```markdown)
- Prioritize outputting Markdown content, if explanation is needed, please keep it concise

{basePrompt}
